# Tables

## Table 1

**Fatty acid composition of various positions of TAGs of sunflower seed oil**

| FA  | SN-1,2,3 | SN-1,2(2,3) | SN-2 | SN-1,3 |
| --- | -------- | ----------- | ---- | ------ |
| St  | 4.6      | 3.6         | 0.6  | 6.6    |
| P   | 7.4      | 5.5         | –0.2 | 11.2   |
| O   | 32.5     | 32.8        | 33.7 | 31.9   |
| L   | 55.5     | 58.1        | 65.9 | 50.3   |

* **St**: stearic acid
* **P**: palmitic acid
* **O**: oleic acid
* **L**: linoleic acid
